requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (NTC/IEC 62471 within RETILAP)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（RETILAP 框架内的 NTC/IEC 62471）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（RETILAP 框架內的 NTC/IEC 62471）

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED lamps and luminaires in Colombia is addressed through the RETILAP technical regulation and the adopted IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems) standard, taken up by ICONTEC as an NTC standard. The assessment classifies products into risk groups (RG0 Exempt through RG3 High risk) based on blue-light-weighted radiance and irradiance. RETILAP, as the mandatory lighting technical regulation, is the legal instrument; IEC 62471 is the referenced technical method commonly used to derive the risk group. Conformity evidence is included in the Certificate of Conformity issued through an ONAC-accredited body, and higher-risk groups (RG2/RG3) require usage warnings and may face restrictions.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚 LED 灯和灯具的光生物安全通过 RETILAP 技术法规及经 ICONTEC 采纳为 NTC 标准的 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）处理。评估依据蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度将产品分为危险组别（RG0 豁免至 RG3 高危险）。作为强制性照明技术法规，RETILAP 是法律工具；IEC 62471 是通常用于得出危险组别的引用技术方法。符合性证据纳入由 ONAC 认可机构出具的合格证书，较高危险组别（RG2/RG3）须附使用警告并可能面临限制。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞 LED 燈和燈具的光生物安全通過 RETILAP 技術法規及經 ICONTEC 採納為 NTC 標準的 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）處理。評估依據藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度將產品分為危險組別（RG0 豁免至 RG3 高危險）。作為強制性照明技術法規，RETILAP 是法律工具；IEC 62471 是通常用於得出危險組別的引用技術方法。符合性證據納入由 ONAC 認可機構出具的合格證書，較高危險組別（RG2/RG3）須附使用警告並可能面臨限制。

standards_or_laws: RETILAP — Reglamento Tecnico de Iluminacion y Alumbrado Publico (mandatory lighting technical regulation)
NTC / IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (ICONTEC adoption; risk group classification)

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471. GB/T 20145 is a recommended (tuijian, GB/T) standard and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement for residential luminaires is not uniformly prescribed. The risk-group methodology is shared with IEC 62471, so the underlying classification approach is comparable, but the Chinese standard carries recommended status rather than the binding character it has within Colombia's RETILAP regulation.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471。GB/T 20145 为推荐性（GB/T）标准，并非对中国市场所有 LED 灯具均为强制；对居民灯具的执行未统一规定。危险组别方法与 IEC 62471 共通，故基础分类方式可比，但中国标准属推荐性，而非其在哥伦比亚 RETILAP 法规内所具的约束性。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471。GB/T 20145 為推薦性（GB/T）標準，並非對中國市場所有 LED 燈具均為強制；對居民燈具的執行未統一規定。危險組別方法與 IEC 62471 共通，故基礎分類方式可比，但中國標準屬推薦性，而非其在哥倫比亞 RETILAP 法規內所具的約束性。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, aligned with IEC 62471)

gap.en: In China GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and not uniformly enforced; in Colombia photobiological safety sits within the mandatory RETILAP regulation and the adopted IEC 62471 method, with evidence required in the Certificate of Conformity. The risk-group methodology is shared (both IEC 62471-based), so the technical assessment may be reusable, but: (1) the classification must be formally documented for the Colombian conformity assessment, not treated as optional; (2) the evidence must be packaged for the ONAC-accredited body rather than a CN report on its own; (3) RG2/RG3 products require warnings/labelling, and RETILAP-specific labelling content applies in Spanish; (4) confirm with the certification body whether a CN IEC 62471 test report from an ILAC MRA lab is acceptable or whether retesting is required. Most general-purpose LED products target RG0/RG1, but the classification must still be on record.
gap.zh: 在中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性且执行不统一；在哥伦比亚光生物安全位于强制性 RETILAP 法规及采纳的 IEC 62471 方法之内，证据须纳入合格证书。危险组别方法共通（均基于 IEC 62471），故技术评估或可复用，但：（1）分类须为哥伦比亚合格评定正式记录，不可视为可选；（2）证据须为 ONAC 认可机构整理，而非单独的中国报告；（3）RG2/RG3 产品须警告/标签，且适用西班牙语的 RETILAP 特定标签内容；（4）须与认证机构确认中国 ILAC MRA 实验室的 IEC 62471 检测报告能否被接受，或须重新检测。大多数通用 LED 产品面向 RG0/RG1，但分类仍须存档。
gap.zht: 在中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性且執行不統一；在哥倫比亞光生物安全位於強制性 RETILAP 法規及採納的 IEC 62471 方法之內，證據須納入合格證書。危險組別方法共通（均基於 IEC 62471），故技術評估或可複用，但：（1）分類須為哥倫比亞合格評定正式記錄，不可視為可選；（2）證據須為 ONAC 認可機構整理，而非單獨的中國報告；（3）RG2/RG3 產品須警告/標籤，且適用西班牙語的 RETILAP 特定標籤內容；（4）須與認證機構確認中國 ILAC MRA 實驗室的 IEC 62471 檢測報告能否被接受，或須重新檢測。大多數通用 LED 產品面向 RG0/RG1，但分類仍須存檔。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory within RETILAP scope — photobiological risk-group assessment per adopted IEC 62471 is part of the RETILAP Certificate of Conformity; RG2/RG3 require warnings/labelling
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not uniformly prescribed

source.publisher: Ministerio de Minas y Energia de Colombia (RETILAP)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological risk-group classification for LED products in Colombia is required within the mandatory RETILAP regulation using the adopted IEC 62471 method, with evidence in the ONAC-accredited Certificate of Conformity. China's GB/T 20145 is the same IEC 62471 methodology but recommended-only, so a CN risk-group assessment may be technically reusable yet must be formally documented for the Colombian conformity assessment and may require ONAC-body acceptance or retesting; RG2/RG3 products require Spanish-language warnings.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚 LED 产品的光生物危险组别分类须在强制性 RETILAP 法规内采用采纳的 IEC 62471 方法进行，证据纳入 ONAC 认可合格证书。中国 GB/T 20145 为同一 IEC 62471 方法但仅推荐性，故中国危险组别评估技术上或可复用，但须为哥伦比亚合格评定正式记录，并可能须经 ONAC 机构接受或重新检测；RG2/RG3 产品须附西班牙语警告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞 LED 產品的光生物危險組別分類須在強制性 RETILAP 法規內採用採納的 IEC 62471 方法進行，證據納入 ONAC 認可合格證書。中國 GB/T 20145 為同一 IEC 62471 方法但僅推薦性，故中國危險組別評估技術上或可複用，但須為哥倫比亞合格評定正式記錄，並可能須經 ONAC 機構接受或重新檢測；RG2/RG3 產品須附西班牙語警告。

requirement_topic.zh: 光度声明及照明性能标签（RETILAP）
requirement_topic.zht: 光度聲明及照明性能標籤（RETILAP）

summary.en: RETILAP requires that lamps and luminaires placed on the Colombian market declare and label specified photometric and performance parameters — typically luminous flux, luminous efficacy, correlated colour temperature (CCT), colour rendering index (CRI), rated life, and the photobiological risk group where applicable. Photometric testing follows the methods referenced by RETILAP and the adopted IEC/NTC photometry standards. The declared values must be supported by test evidence in the Certificate of Conformity issued through an ONAC-accredited body, and the label content must be in Spanish. This combines a performance-disclosure function (alongside the RETIQ energy label) and is enforced by the SIC.
summary.zh: RETILAP 要求在哥伦比亚市场销售的灯和灯具声明并标注指定光度及性能参数——通常包括光通量、光效、相关色温（CCT）、显色指数（CRI）、额定寿命，以及适用时的光生物危险组别。光度检测遵循 RETILAP 引用的方法及采纳的 IEC/NTC 光度标准。声明值须有合格证书中的检测证据支持，证书由 ONAC 认可机构出具，标签内容须为西班牙语。这与 RETIQ 能效标签共同承担性能披露功能，并由 SIC 执法。
summary.zht: RETILAP 要求在哥倫比亞市場銷售的燈和燈具聲明並標註指定光度及性能參數——通常包括光通量、光效、相關色溫（CCT）、顯色指數（CRI）、額定壽命，以及適用時的光生物危險組別。光度檢測遵循 RETILAP 引用的方法及採納的 IEC/NTC 光度標準。聲明值須有合格證書中的檢測證據支持，證書由 ONAC 認可機構出具，標籤內容須為西班牙語。這與 RETIQ 能效標籤共同承擔性能披露功能，並由 SIC 執法。

standards_or_laws: RETILAP — Reglamento Tecnico de Iluminacion y Alumbrado Publico (photometric declaration and labelling content)
Adopted NTC/IEC photometry standards (e.g., for luminous flux, efficacy, CCT, CRI measurement)

summary.en: In China, photometric and performance parameters for LED products are addressed by performance standards such as GB/T 24823 (LED luminaire performance), GB/T 24908 (self-ballasted LED lamp performance), and related GB/T methods, with the China Energy Label (GB 30255) declaring efficiency grade. Chinese product packaging declares parameters per GB conventions and in Chinese. There is no mutual recognition: the Chinese declared values, label format, and measurement reports are not automatically accepted for the RETILAP declaration, which has its own required content and Spanish-language format.
summary.zh: 在中国，LED 产品的光度及性能参数由 GB/T 24823（LED 灯具性能）、GB/T 24908（自镇流 LED 灯性能）及相关 GB/T 方法等性能标准处理，中国能效标识（GB 30255）声明能效等级。中国产品包装按 GB 惯例并以中文声明参数。无互认：中国声明值、标签格式及测量报告不自动被 RETILAP 声明接受，后者有其自身要求内容及西班牙语格式。
summary.zht: 在中國，LED 產品的光度及性能參數由 GB/T 24823（LED 燈具性能）、GB/T 24908（自鎮流 LED 燈性能）及相關 GB/T 方法等性能標準處理，中國能效標識（GB 30255）聲明能效等級。中國產品包裝按 GB 慣例並以中文聲明參數。無互認：中國聲明值、標籤格式及測量報告不自動被 RETILAP 聲明接受，後者有其自身要求內容及西班牙語格式。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 24823 — Performance requirements for general lighting LED luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 24908 — Performance requirements for self-ballasted LED lamps (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: Both regimes test similar photometric parameters using IEC-aligned methods, so measurement results may be partially transferable, but the declaration and labelling obligations differ: (1) RETILAP prescribes which parameters must appear on the Colombian label and in what form, in Spanish — a Chinese GB-format declaration is not compliant as-is; (2) declared values must be evidenced in the ONAC-accredited Certificate of Conformity, not a standalone CN report; (3) testing should reflect 110/220 V, 60 Hz operation, which can affect declared flux/power/efficacy versus 220 V/50 Hz testing; (4) the RETILAP photometric declaration is separate from, but complementary to, the RETIQ energy label and the photobiological risk group. Manufacturers should plan a Colombian-format label and confirm whether CN photometric reports from an ILAC MRA lab are acceptable to the certification body.
gap.zh: 两制度均采用 IEC 对齐方法检测类似光度参数，故测量结果或可部分转用，但声明和标签义务不同：（1）RETILAP 规定须在哥伦比亚标签上出现的参数及其形式，且为西班牙语——中国 GB 格式声明原样不合规；（2）声明值须在 ONAC 认可合格证书中证明，而非单独的中国报告；（3）检测应反映 110/220 V、60 Hz 运行，相较 220 V/50 Hz 检测可能影响声明的光通量/功率/光效；（4）RETILAP 光度声明独立于但补充 RETIQ 能效标签及光生物危险组别。制造商应规划哥伦比亚格式标签，并确认中国 ILAC MRA 实验室的光度报告是否被认证机构接受。
gap.zht: 兩制度均採用 IEC 對齊方法檢測類似光度參數，故測量結果或可部分轉用，但聲明和標籤義務不同：（1）RETILAP 規定須在哥倫比亞標籤上出現的參數及其形式，且為西班牙語——中國 GB 格式聲明原樣不合規；（2）聲明值須在 ONAC 認可合格證書中證明，而非單獨的中國報告；（3）檢測應反映 110/220 V、60 Hz 運行，相較 220 V/50 Hz 檢測可能影響聲明的光通量/功率/光效；（4）RETILAP 光度聲明獨立於但補充 RETIQ 能效標籤及光生物危險組別。製造商應規劃哥倫比亞格式標籤，並確認中國 ILAC MRA 實驗室的光度報告是否被認證機構接受。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RETILAP photometric declaration and Spanish-language labelling content (with Certificate of Conformity via an ONAC-accredited body) required for lamps and luminaires in Colombia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory / recommended mix — China Energy Label (GB 30255) declaration is mandatory; GB/T performance standards (24823, 24908) govern declared parameters

source.publisher: Ministerio de Minas y Energia de Colombia (RETILAP)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RETILAP requires a Spanish-language photometric/performance declaration (luminous flux, efficacy, CCT, CRI, rated life, and risk group where applicable) evidenced in the ONAC-accredited Certificate of Conformity. China's GB/T performance standards measure similar parameters using IEC-aligned methods, so results may be partly transferable, but the CN label format and reports are not accepted as-is — a Colombian-format label and certification-body acceptance (or retesting at 110/220 V, 60 Hz) are required. This declaration complements the RETIQ energy label and the IEC 62471 risk group.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] RETILAP 要求西班牙语光度/性能声明（光通量、光效、色温、显色指数、额定寿命，及适用时的危险组别），并在 ONAC 认可合格证书中证明。中国 GB/T 性能标准采用 IEC 对齐方法测量类似参数，故结果或可部分转用，但中国标签格式及报告不被原样接受——须哥伦比亚格式标签及认证机构接受（或按 110/220 V、60 Hz 重新检测）。该声明补充 RETIQ 能效标签及 IEC 62471 危险组别。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] RETILAP 要求西班牙語光度/性能聲明（光通量、光效、色溫、顯色指數、額定壽命，及適用時的危險組別），並在 ONAC 認可合格證書中證明。中國 GB/T 性能標準採用 IEC 對齊方法測量類似參數，故結果或可部分轉用，但中國標籤格式及報告不被原樣接受——須哥倫比亞格式標籤及認證機構接受（或按 110/220 V、60 Hz 重新檢測）。該聲明補充 RETIQ 能效標籤及 IEC 62471 危險組別。
